max_tier_cap_normal_if_unresolved.applies_when: negative variable is active and the same axis has no active repair / confirmation / boundary counter-signal
max_tier_cap_normal_if_unresolved.release_condition: at least one counter_signal_candidate on the same axis is active, or the settlement explanation explicitly records that the missed / absent fact was repaired
max_tier_cap_normal_if_unresolved.explanation_template: 该轴存在缺席 / 错过 / 回避事实，且没有修补证据；本轴最高只能到一般。

max_tier_cap_good.applies_when: misread / proxy / public-boundary risk variable is active and no boundary-clearing counter-signal is active
max_tier_cap_good.release_condition: counter_signal_candidate on the same axis proves boundary, authorship, public scope, or confirmation was handled
max_tier_cap_good.explanation_template: 该轴存在误读、代言或公开边界风险；风险未被处理时，本轴最高只能到良好。

pressure_cap_requires_explanation.applies_when: money / family / dorm / rule pressure is active and no explanation / acknowledgement signal is active
pressure_cap_requires_explanation.release_condition: counter_signal_candidate or context signal records that the pressure was named, explained, or bounded
pressure_cap_requires_explanation.explanation_template: 现实压力已经进入本轴；若没有说明和边界处理，本轴最高只能到良好。

hard_regret_gate.release_condition: no automatic release; only route-specific later settlement can move the route temperature while this axis remains regret
hard_regret_gate.explanation_template: 该轴出现过期或切断事实，本轴直接进入或强化遗憾档。

soft_negative_only.release_condition: none required; variable only subtracts score
soft_negative_only.explanation_template: 该变量只参与扣分，不单独设置封顶。

proxy_axis_rule.reason: 这两个家庭关系轴目前没有家庭专属变量；为避免回写正式路线 JSON，本版接受现实压力代理变量，但不允许仅凭代理变量结算出完美家庭轴。
proxy_axis_rule.future_upgrade: 若后续要让家庭轴可达完美，需要在正式路线 JSON 或独立变量映射层补入 family_acknowledged / family_boundary_named / family_pressure_explained 等专属变量。

route_tier_policy.perfect_rule: all strong axes are perfect, weighted route score >= 75, and no active unresolved hard cap remains on a strong axis
route_tier_policy.good_rule: all strong axes are at least good and weighted route score >= 60
route_tier_policy.regret_rule: weighted route score < 40 or an active hard_regret_gate appears on a strong axis
route_tier_policy.echo_axis_rule: echo axes can lower route temperature and provide ending explanation, but do not alone force whole-route regret unless route-specific rules promote them
